title: T-048 — dashboard_summary + launch_alerts + missing_required_cols views (NPD-e)
prompt:
# T-048 — Dashboard SQL views

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §11.2, §11.3, §11.4
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Introduce three RLS-scoped read-only SQL views (dashboard_summary, launch_alerts, missing_required_cols) so the NPD dashboard can render counters, RED/YELLOW/GREEN alert levels, and per-FA missing-data text without recomputing in app code.

## Implementation contract
1. Migration packages/db/migrations/0048_npd_dashboard_views.sql creates: missing_required_cols (per-FA list of empty Required_for_done cells joined with dept names), dashboard_summary (per-tenant counters: total_active, fully_complete, pending, total_built), launch_alerts (per-FA days_left + alert_level RED/YELLOW/GREEN computed from launch_date thresholds + missing_data agg).
2. All three views use security_invoker=true so tenant RLS on product cascades through.
3. Drizzle types in packages/db/src/schema/dashboard-views.ts (read-only Select types only — no Insert).
4. RED test asserts each view returns rows under tenant RLS and zero rows for foreign tenant.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0048_npd_dashboard_views.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/dashboard-views.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/dashboard-views.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0048 runs on a fresh DB with seed FAs, when SELECT * FROM dashboard_summary runs as tenant A then tenant B, then each session sees only its own row aggregates per §11.2 view DDL
2. Given launch_alerts view exists, when an FA has launch_date NULL or days_left <= 10, then alert_level is RED; when days_left between 11 and 21 with missing data, then YELLOW; else GREEN per §11.3 thresholds
3. Given missing_required_cols view exists, when an FA has Required_for_done cells empty in Core+MRP+Tech, then the view returns 'Core: ... MRP: ... Tech: ...' formatted string per §11.4

## Test strategy
- RED: write packages/db/__tests__/dashboard-views.test.ts asserting RLS isolation + alert thresholds + missing-data formatting before migration exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test dashboard-views'

## Risk red lines
- Do not omit security_invoker=true on any view
- Do not hardcode threshold values (must read from Reference.AlertThresholds — joined or via scalar subquery)
- Do not allow INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE through any view (read-only enforced by view definition)

pipeline_inputs.description: Create dashboard_summary + launch_alerts + missing_required_cols SQL views with RLS via security_invoker for NPD dashboard rendering.
pipeline_inputs.details: Migration 0048 emits three views. dashboard_summary aggregates COUNT FILTER for total_active/fully_complete/pending/total_built per tenant. launch_alerts joins fa with launch_date computing days_left + RED/YELLOW/GREEN level reading thresholds from Reference.AlertThresholds. missing_required_cols formats per-dept list of empty Required_for_done cells. Drizzle exports Select-only types (no Insert/Update on views).
out_of_scope: Do not implement Server Actions for the dashboard (T-051)
Do not build the dashboard UI (T-052)
